title: Storm overflows: policy and guidance
body: "This publication aims to support water and sewerage companies and regulators in carrying out their responsibilities related to storm overflows.   It does not impose any new legal requirements. Instead, it:    reflects developments in storm overflows legislation and policy since the Urban Waste Water Treatment (England and Wales) Regulations 1994  clarifies how to apply measures identified in the storm overflows discharge reduction plan    The Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (Defra) wants to ensure a clear planning framework, to support:     the significant forward investment needed from water and sewerage companies   a robust oversight and enforcement regime   "
